title: Orca
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Orca''' was a pair of [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The ships were part of a convoy containing supplies for a new base that was attacked by [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] and the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Red Wind]]''. Despite this pressure they made it into hyperspace by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] in an [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''
